user.title: Samsung Family Hub
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Family Hub refrigerator.

oauth.title: Select your Family Hub
oauth.description: Select your SmartThings integration and choose your Family Hub refrigerator from the list.

samsung_iot.title: Samsung Account authentication
samsung_iot.description: Camera image downloads require a Samsung Account token separate from SmartThings. Choose how to provide it.

menu_options.samsung_credentials: Sign in with Samsung Account email and password (no 2FA)
menu_options.samsung_token: Paste a Samsung IoT refresh token (required for 2FA accounts)

samsung_credentials.title: Samsung Account
samsung_credentials.description: Enter your Samsung Account credentials. **2FA must be disabled** on this account. If 2FA is enabled, use the refresh token option instead.

samsung_token.title: Samsung IoT refresh token
samsung_token.description:
Paste your Samsung IoT refresh token. To get one:
1. Open browser dev tools (F12) → Network tab
2. Log in to account.samsung.com with your Samsung Account (complete 2FA)
3. Filter network requests for `samsungiotcloud.com`
4. Find a token response and copy the `refresh_token` value

The token is long-lived and will auto-refresh — you only need to do this once.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Tokens expire after 24 hours. Create one at https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

data.device_id: Device ID (optional — leave blank to auto-detect)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings token has expired. Enter a new one from https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

error.invalid_samsung_auth: Invalid Samsung Account email or password.
error.samsung_2fa: This Samsung Account has 2FA enabled. Use the 'Paste a Samsung IoT refresh token' option instead.
error.samsung_auth_error: Samsung Account authentication failed. Check your credentials and try again.
error.invalid_samsung_token: The Samsung IoT refresh token is invalid or expired. Capture a new one.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Family Hub is already configured.
